# kSecDigestTypeAttribute

**Global Variable**

The digest algorithm.

## Declaration

```swift
let kSecDigestTypeAttribute: CFString
```

## Discussion

Use one of the values listed in [doc://com.apple.security/documentation/Security/transform-attributes#Digest-Types].
